CustomField.description: A hidden field that stores the 'Reinsurance Cert Requirement' value when it is overridden separately from the 'Insurance Cert Requirement'. Once the Reinsurance value is overridden, changes to the Insurance Certificate value will no longer affect the Reinsurance value.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A hidden field that stores the 'Reinsurance Cert Requirement' value when it is overridden separately from the 'Insurance Cert Requirement'. Once the Reinsurance value is overridden, changes to the Insurance Certificate value will no longer affect the Reinsurance value.
CustomField.label: _Override
